name: Leonard Cohen
abstract: Leonard Norman Cohen (September 21, 1934 – November 7, 2016) was a Canadian songwriter, singer, poet, and novelist. Themes commonly explored throughout his work include faith and mortality, isolation and depression, betrayal and redemption, social and political conflict, sexual and romantic love, desire, regret, and loss.

works_created.t: Hey, That's No Way to Say Goodbye / Sisters of Mercy

about_quotes.speaker: Wendy Oxenhorn
about_quotes.evidence: I can’t remember if it was Leonard Cohen or Bob Dylan said that the music is up there and we just bring it down.
about_quotes.doc_title: Wendy Oxenhorn interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 22, 2026
